text:
{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In dem Brandmüllerischen Buchladen wird ein <BIBL><TITLE>Project von <AUTHOR>Hiorini</AUTHOR> klugen und verständigen Hauß-Patter, wie auch adelichem Land-Leben</TITLE>, welches durch Sub­scriptionen in <VOLUME>2. Folianten</VOLUME> à <PRIZE>6. fl.</PRIZE> gedrucket wird</BIBL>. Ferner ist allda neulich fertig worden: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Lutheri</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Bibel</TITLE> mit Figuren in <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT></BIBL>; Item, des Herrn Abbts <BIBL><AUTHOR>Fleury</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Kirchen-Historien</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> aus dem frantzösischen ubersetzt</BIBL>; Item, <BIBL><TITLE>die gantze Pflicht des Menschen</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> aus dem Englischen ubersetzt</BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":5,"explanation":"1. Removed the erroneous extra closing </TITLE> tag after "Land-Leben" — the original had two </TITLE> tags but only one opening <TITLE>. The TITLE tag now correctly wraps "Project von Hiorini klugen und verständigen Hauß-Patter, wie auch adelichem Land-Leben".
2. Moved the opening <TITLE> to correctly encompass the full title phrase starting at "Project" (the original had </TITLE> misplaced after the AUTHOR tag, breaking the nesting).
3. Wrapped the Fleury entry in <BIBL>...</BIBL> tags, since it was missing its BIBL wrapper (the AUTHOR, TITLE, and FORMAT tags for Fleury's work were not enclosed in a BIBL element like the other book entries).
4. Fixed Unicode escape artifacts: √∫ → ü (Brandmüllerischen, neulich), √§ → ä (verständigen), √ü → ß (Hauß), √† → à, √∂ → ö (frantzösischen). These were OCR/encoding artifacts of the original German text.
5. Corrected "avelichem" to "adelichem" and "Sub. scriptionen" conceptually kept as "Sub­scriptionen" (hyphenated word break), reflecting likely OCR errors in the original."}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>In dem Brandmüllerischen Buchladen wird ein <BIBL><TITLE>Project von <AUTHOR>Hiorini</AUTHOR> klugen und verständigen Hauß-Patter, wie auch adelichem Land-Leben</TITLE>, welches durch Sub­scriptionen in <VOLUME>2. Folianten</VOLUME> à <PRIZE>6. fl.</PRIZE> gedrucket wird</BIBL>. Ferner ist allda neulich fertig worden: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Lutheri</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Bibel</TITLE> mit Figuren in <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT></BIBL>; Item, des Herrn Abbts <BIBL><AUTHOR>Fleury</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Kirchen-Historien</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> aus dem frantzösischen ubersetzt</BIBL>; Item, <BIBL><TITLE>die gantze Pflicht des Menschen</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> aus dem Englischen ubersetzt</BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
1. Removed the erroneous extra closing </TITLE> tag after "Land-Leben" — the original had two </TITLE> tags but only one opening <TITLE>. The TITLE tag now correctly wraps "Project von Hiorini klugen und verständigen Hauß-Patter, wie auch adelichem Land-Leben".
2. Moved the opening <TITLE> to correctly encompass the full title phrase starting at "Project" (the original had </TITLE> misplaced after the AUTHOR tag, breaking the nesting).
3. Wrapped the Fleury entry in <BIBL>...</BIBL> tags, since it was missing its BIBL wrapper (the AUTHOR, TITLE, and FORMAT tags for Fleury's work were not enclosed in a BIBL element like the other book entries).
4. Fixed Unicode escape artifacts: √∫ → ü (Brandmüllerischen, neulich), √§ → ä (verständigen), √ü → ß (Hauß), √† → à, √∂ → ö (frantzösischen). These were OCR/encoding artifacts of the original German text.
5. Corrected "avelichem" to "adelichem" and "Sub. scriptionen" conceptually kept as "Sub­scriptionen" (hyphenated word break), reflecting likely OCR errors in the original.
